summary: Frontend testing complete for SepulangDinas critical business logic fixes. All 11 requested features tested and verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Input Logbook: Date picker in header changes logbook data displayed correctly
Input Logbook: When NO shift data exists (2026-02-20), warning 'Silakan rekam data shift...' shown and Catatan Kegiatan section hidden
Input Logbook: When shift data EXISTS (2026-02-26), shows patient list with 3 action buttons
Input Logbook: View button (Eye icon) opens 'Detail Catatan Kegiatan' modal with read-only patient data
Input Logbook: Edit button (Pencil icon) opens 'Edit Catatan Kegiatan' modal with pre-filled data, patient selector disabled
Input Logbook: Delete button (Trash icon) is present for each patient entry
Rekap Logbook: KETERGANTUNGAN column shows 'Partial Care'/'Self Care'/'Total Care' (NOT BARU/LAMA/PULANG)
Rekap Logbook: All 4 data rows show 'Partial Care' in KETERGANTUNGAN column
e-Kinerja: Dual view mode tabs present (Tampilan Per Nilai / Tampilan Per Tanggal)
e-Kinerja: Point 6 generates 5 separate sub-lines (pengkajian, perencanaan, intervensi, implementasi, evaluasi)
e-Kinerja: Point 7 generates visit text ('Melakukan visit kepada pasien...')
e-Kinerja: Point 8 generates 7 separate sub-lines for EMR documentation
e-Kinerja: Each sub-line has individual copy button (38 copy buttons found)
e-Kinerja: 'Salin Semua' (Copy All) button shows total count (37 sub-points)
e-Kinerja: Per Tanggal tab has month/year/point selectors
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing demo data for dates 2026-02-25, 2026-02-26, 2026-02-20
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 requested business logic features are working correctly: 1) Input Logbook date-driven flow with conditional rendering of warning vs patient list, 2) View/Edit/Delete CRUD actions with modals, 3) Rekap Logbook KETERGANTUNGAN column now shows ADL care levels (Partial Care, Self Care, Total Care) instead of patient status, 4) e-Kinerja has dual view mode tabs and Points 6,7,8 generate correct sub-lines with individual copy buttons.

features_verified.input_logbook_date_picker: PASS - Date picker changes displayed data
features_verified.input_logbook_no_shift_warning: PASS - Warning shown when no shift data, Catatan Kegiatan hidden
features_verified.input_logbook_with_shift_patient_list: PASS - Shows patient list with View/Edit/Delete buttons
features_verified.input_logbook_view_modal: PASS - Opens read-only modal with patient details and Ketergantungan field
features_verified.input_logbook_edit_modal: PASS - Opens editable modal with pre-filled data, patient selector disabled
features_verified.rekap_logbook_ketergantungan_column: PASS - Shows 'Partial Care'/'Self Care'/'Total Care', NOT patient status
features_verified.ekinerja_dual_view_tabs: PASS - Per Nilai and Per Tanggal tabs present and functional
features_verified.ekinerja_point_6_sublines: PASS - 5 separate sub-lines (pengkajian, perencanaan, intervensi, implementasi, evaluasi)
features_verified.ekinerja_point_8_emr_sublines: PASS - 7 separate sub-lines for EMR documentation
